sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107231" key="u(pe/ralma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέραλμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a <sense id="n107231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hurdle</tr_> for leaping over, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
